name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining needs to be sewn inside out during production, so the leather requirements are extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, finally presenting this boutique to everyone 💪💪 Size: 20cm, Model No. 26599
